name: Salmon Ball
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the salmon, cream cheese, chopped onion, salt, lemon juice, and horseradish mustard until well combined.
2. Form the mixture into a ball on wax paper.
3. Chill in the refrigerator for 4 hours.
4. Crush half a cup of pecans and 3 tablespoons of parsley flakes.
5. Roll the salmon ball in the crushed pecans and parsley mixture.
